name: @personaxis/persona.md
description: CLI for PERSONA.md spec v0.7.0 (Personaxis v12) - define, validate, lint, compile, decompile, push, pull, and migrate AI agent personas. Three-artifact model: personaxis.md (quantitative 10-layer spec), PERSONA.md (LLM-compiled qualitative document), and state.json (mutable runtime state). Ships compile|decompile|push|pull, state init|mutate|show, skills list|pull, and migrate 0.5-to-0.6|0.6-to-0.7 commands.
